title: viola betonicifolia var. yuanfengia
intro: Viola betonicifolia var. yuanfengia is a rare and endemic plant species, also known as the Yunnan Viola, which belongs to the violet family (Violaceae). It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly for its ability to treat fever, headache, and rheumatism due to its anti-inflammatory and analgesic effects. The plant is used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote blood circulation, relieve pain, and reduce swelling, which can lead to a range of health benefits, including improved cardiovascular health and reduced inflammation. Herbal preparations of Viola betonicifolia var. yuanfengia often involve drying and processing the leaves and flowers to make teas, decoctions, or infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
